markdown:
# Lute of Thunderous Thumping

This reinforced [[lute]] can be wielded as a magic Club that deals an extra 2d8 Thunder damage on a hit.

## Sing and Swing

If you're a Bard, you can use your Charisma modifier instead of your Strength modifier when making a melee attack roll with the [[lute]], provided you sing or hum while making the attack.
